ddls:
CREATE TABLE "executives" (
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executive */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the executive */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the executive (e.g., Managing Director, Director, Independent Director) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the executive started in the current designation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the executive ended in the current designation (if applicable) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the executive */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the executive */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the executive */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the executive */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the executive */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the executive */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the executive */,
  "photo" TEXT /* Photo of the executive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation package */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive associated with the package */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the package was applicable */,
  "remuneration" REAL /* Remuneration amount for the package */,
  "increase_percentage" REAL /* Percentage increase in remuneration (if applicable) */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Bonus amount for the executive */,
  "stock_options" INTEGER /* Number of stock options granted */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the executive for the year */,
  "compensation_type" TEXT /* Type of compensation (e.g., salary, bonus, stock options) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the compensation package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_packages_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designations" (
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designation */,
  "designation_name" TEXT /* Name of the designation (e.g., Managing Director, Director, Independent Director) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the designation */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Hierarchical level of the designation */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the designation belongs to */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities associated with the designation */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Typical salary range for the designation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executive_designations" (
  "executive_designation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executive designation */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive associated with the designation */,
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the executive started in the designation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the executive ended in the designation (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the designation change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the designation change */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the designation change was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("executive_designation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executive_designations_designation_id FOREIGN KEY ("designation_id") REFERENCES designations ("designation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executive_designations_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* The year */,
  "fiscal_year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, executive, board member) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive associated with the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* The report data */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., executive compensation, board member compensation) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
